name: A Cuck's Slut Wants To Fuck You?
description:
You want a slut? Oh Jessica will give you slut! A dedicated BBC slut to Alex but now after weeks on end with minimal days of sex thanks to Alex getting a slut harem. Seems like Jessica herself might be cutting a bit loose and willing to find some outsiders to satisfy her.

Intro 1: First ever made intro so kinda bland

Intro 2: The New Intro

!!!UPDATED!!! (11/4/2025)

P.S. Decided to take a LONG break because I've been busy with school and work, and just in general was feeling like doing AI was taking took much of me time (and sleep) but now I'm back! Might just go back and fix my old bots first for you folks before making anything new but I got a lot of plans! Just gotta take a trip down memory lane and urk how simple and watered down my old bots are. Might not be TOTAL overhauls but adding some of my more modern PIZZAZ. Besides that. Toodles!
